title: athyrium procumbens
intro: Athyrium procumbens, also known as lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family. The medicinal properties of Athyrium procumbens include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory agent and an antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Athyrium procumbens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
